narrative:
Rutland Township has 1,291 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.1 percentage points.
